product_overview: Clio is an academic integrity platform that captures proof-of-write signals (WPM, paste events, session snapshots) while students write and provides teachers with grading, similarity detection, and analytics to support confident assessment.
core_goals: Provide a distraction-minimized, autosaving Tiptap editor that records lightweight behavioral signals to prove authorship.
Enable teachers to manage classes and assignments, review submissions with integrity signals and similarity comparisons, and grade efficiently (single and bulk).
Protect user data and enforce RBAC with secure Next.js API routes and Supabase-backed storage and RLS policies.
Deliver actionable analytics and export capabilities (DOCX/PDF for essays, CSV for grades) to support reporting and classroom workflows.

features.name: Teacher Login
features.description: Teachers can authenticate with their credentials to access teacher-only areas like the dashboard, assignments, and analytics.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username "teacher_test" -> Enter password "teacher123" -> Click "Sign In" button -> Redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter username "teacher_test" -> Enter incorrect password "wrongpass" -> Click "Sign In" button -> See authentication error message

features.name: Student Login
features.description: Students sign in to access the editor, drafts, and their personal dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username "student_test_new" -> Enter password "student123" -> Click "Sign In" button -> Redirected to /editor
Navigate to /login -> Leave username empty -> Click "Sign In" button -> See validation error indicating username is required

features.name: Registration
features.description: New users register an account and select a role (student or teacher) to receive appropriate access.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name, email, password, select role = "student" -> Click "Create Account" -> Redirected to /editor
Navigate to /register -> Fill email already in use -> Click "Create Account" -> See error message indicating account already exists

features.name: Teacher Dashboard with Filters
features.description: Teachers view and filter submissions by grading status, integrity score range, and search terms to find and prioritize review work.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click "Show Filters" to expand filter panel -> Click ALL/GRADED/UNGRADED toggle -> Adjust integrity score range inputs -> Enter student name in search -> See filtered submissions list
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click "Show Filters" to expand filter panel -> Enter non-numeric value into integrity score field -> Click Apply Filters -> See validation error or no results returned

features.name: Bulk Grade Submissions
features.description: Teachers select multiple submissions and apply the same grade and optional feedback to all selected items in one action.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click checkbox on individual submissions -> Click "Select All" to select visible submissions -> Click "Bulk Grade (N)" button -> Enter score in bulk modal -> Enter optional feedback -> Click "Grade N Submissions" -> See success confirmation

Navigate to /dashboard -> Select multiple submissions -> Click "Bulk Grade (N)" button -> Leave score empty in modal -> Click "Grade N Submissions" -> See validation error indicating score is required

features.name: Rubric-Based Grading
features.description: Teachers grade a single submission using a rubric (Content/Grammar/Structure/Originality) with auto-calculated total and feedback entry.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on a submission to open detail panel -> Click "Overall Mode" to switch to "Rubric Mode" -> Enter scores for Content (0-25), Grammar (0-25), Structure (0-25), Originality (0-25) -> See total auto-calculate -> Enter feedback -> Click "Submit Grade" -> See grade saved confirmation

Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on a submission to open detail panel -> Switch to "Rubric Mode" -> Enter out-of-range score (e.g., 30) for Content -> Click "Submit Grade" -> See validation error indicating score must be within allowed range

features.name: Student Editor with Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Students write essays in a Tiptap-based editor with autosave, keyboard shortcuts for save/submit, word count, paste detection, and due date visibility.
user_flows: Navigate to /editor -> Write text in the editor -> View word count progress bar -> View due date countdown -> Press Ctrl+S to save draft -> See "Draft saved" notification

Navigate to /editor -> Paste a large block of text into the editor -> See paste detection warning flagged in the UI -> Attempt to submit -> See submission confirmation requiring acknowledgement or additional integrity confirmation
Navigate to /editor -> Write text -> Press Ctrl+Enter to submit -> Confirm submission -> Redirected to /submissions and see new submission in list
Navigate to /editor -> Press Ctrl+Enter to submit while exceeding assignment max words -> See validation error indicating word count limit exceeded

features.name: Student Drafts
features.description: Students can view and manage saved drafts that are autosaved from the editor.
user_flows: Navigate to /drafts -> See list of drafts -> Click a draft to open in editor -> Edit content -> Press Ctrl+S to save -> See "Draft saved" notification
Navigate to /drafts -> Click a draft that was removed externally -> See "Draft not found" error message

features.name: Student Profile
features.description: Users view and edit their profile fields such as name, email, class, and course.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View profile information -> Edit full name and class field -> Click "Save Changes" -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /profile -> Edit email to invalid format (e.g., "bad-email") -> Click "Save Changes" -> See validation error indicating invalid email

features.name: Assignments Management
features.description: Teachers create, edit, and delete assignments with due dates, descriptions, and word limits.
user_flows: Navigate to /assignments -> Click "Create Assignment" -> Fill title, due date, max word count, description -> Click "Save" -> See new assignment in list
Navigate to /assignments -> Fill due date in the past -> Click "Save" -> See validation error indicating due date must be in the future

features.name: Classes Management
features.description: Teachers create and manage classes and enroll students into sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /classes -> Click "Create Class" -> Fill class name and section details -> Click "Create" -> See class appear in class list
Navigate to /classes -> Attempt to create a class with a duplicate identifier -> Click "Create" -> See error message indicating duplicate class

features.name: Similarity Comparison
features.description: Teachers review flagged submission pairs and open expandable side-by-side comparisons to inspect potential plagiarism or collusion.
user_flows: Navigate to /similarity -> View flagged pairs list -> Click on a pair to expand content comparison -> See side-by-side text from both submissions -> Filter by student name to narrow results
Navigate to /similarity -> Click on a pair -> Similarity API returns an error -> See "Unable to load comparison" error message

features.name: Teacher Analytics
features.description: Teachers view class-wide analytics including integrity score distributions and performance trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> View charts for integrity score distribution and submission trends -> Apply date range filter -> See charts update to reflect selected range
Navigate to /analytics -> API fails to return data -> See "Unable to load analytics" message and a fallback empty state

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Students see assignment cards, notifications, and quick links to edit or submit work from a personalized dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /student-dashboard -> See assignment cards and notifications -> Click an assignment card -> Redirected to /editor with assignment loaded
Navigate to /student-dashboard -> Student has no enrolled classes -> See empty assignment cards and instructional message prompting enrollment

features.name: Student Analytics
features.description: Students can view personal performance analytics and trends based on their submissions and integrity scores.
user_flows: Navigate to /student-analytics -> View graphs and metrics summarizing personal performance and integrity trends
Navigate to /student-analytics -> No submission history available -> See "No analytics data available" message

features.name: Exports
features.description: Users export essays to DOCX/PDF and teachers export grades as CSV for offline use.
user_flows: Navigate to /editor -> Click export -> Choose DOCX -> Download begins and file saved to device
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click export grades -> Choose CSV -> See download error if backend fails and an error message

routes.description: User login page for both teachers and students
Teacher dashboard - review submissions, grade essays, bulk actions
Student essay editor with auto-save, word count, due dates
Student dashboard with assignment cards and notifications

features.name: Teacher Login
features.description: Login as teacher with username and password

features.name: Student Login
features.description: Login as student with username and password

features.name: Teacher Dashboard with Filters
features.description: Teacher can view submissions with enhanced filters (graded/ungraded, score range)
user_interactions: Click "Show Filters" to expand filter panel
Search by student name or assignment title

features.name: Bulk Grade Submissions
features.description: Teacher selects multiple submissions and grades them at once
user_interactions: Click "Select All" to select all visible

features.name: Rubric-Based Grading
features.description: Teacher grades using Content/Grammar/Structure/Originality criteria
user_interactions: Click on a submission to open detail panel
Click "Overall Mode" to switch to "Rubric Mode"
Enter scores for Content (0-25), Grammar (0-25), Structure (0-25), Originality (0-25)

features.name: Student Editor with Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Student writes essays with keyboard shortcuts for save, submit, export
user_interactions: Press Escape to toggle focus mode

features.name: Student Profile
features.description: Student views and edits their profile
user_interactions: Edit full name, email, class, course

features.name: Similarity Comparison
features.description: Teacher views plagiarism detection with expandable side-by-side text comparison
user_interactions: Click on a pair to expand content comparison
View side-by-side text from both submissions
Filter by student or assignment name

known_limitations.issue: Student dashboard requires /api/assignments endpoint to return student-visible assignments
known_limitations.impact: Dashboard may show empty assignment cards if student has no enrolled classes
